channel.title: GitHub 热门日报
channel.description: 每天一份 GitHub Trending 中文精选

item.title: usestrix/strix
item.description: 待翻译：Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.

item.title: JuliusBrussee/caveman
item.description: 待翻译：🪨 why use many token when few token do trick — Claude Code skill that cuts 65% of tokens by talking like caveman

item.title: msitarzewski/agency-agents
item.description: 待翻译：A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

item.title: hasaneyldrm/exercises-dataset
item.description: 待翻译：A comprehensive dataset of 433 fitness exercises. Each entry includes name, category, target muscle group, equipment, instructions, thumbnail image, and animation video.

item.title: santifer/career-ops
item.description: 待翻译：AI-powered job search system built on Claude Code. 14 skill modes, Go dashboard, PDF generation, batch processing.

item.title: obra/superpowers
item.description: 待翻译：An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
item.category: 开发框架, AI代理, skills

item.title: ChromeDevTools/chrome-devtools-mcp
item.description: 待翻译：Chrome DevTools for coding agents

item.title: browser-use/video-use
item.description: 待翻译：Edit videos with coding agents

item.title: actions/checkout
item.description: 待翻译：Action for checking out a repo

item.title: affaan-m/ECC
item.description: 待翻译：The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
item.category: AI代理, 记忆管理, skills, harness, 安全

item.title: HKUDS/Vibe-Trading
item.description: 待翻译："Vibe-Trading: Your Personal Trading Agent"

item.title: agentskills/agentskills
item.description: 待翻译：Specification and documentation for Agent Skills

item.title: openai/codex-plugin-cc
item.description: 待翻译：Use Codex from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks.

item.title: langflow-ai/langflow
item.description: 待翻译：Langflow is a powerful tool for building and deploying AI-powered agents and workflows.

item.title: pytorch/pytorch
item.description: 待翻译：Tensors and Dynamic neural networks in Python with strong GPU acceleration

item.title: harvard-edge/cs249r_book
item.description: 待翻译：Machine Learning Systems

item.title: ryanmcdermott/clean-code-javascript
item.description: 待翻译：Clean Code concepts adapted for JavaScript

item.title: GitHub 热门日报 · 17 个项目
